message:
bd-2yd: add unit tests for model registry

Add 23 comprehensive unit tests covering src/models.rs:

- Built-in model loading from AuthStorage (3 tests)
- Custom models.json parsing and application (7 tests)
- Model filtering by availability/API keys (2 tests)
- Model lookup by provider/id (1 test)
- Error handling for malformed/invalid JSON (3 tests)
- Find and filter operations (3 tests)
- API key resolution and auth headers (1 test)
- Default path construction (1 test)
- Model defaults (context window, max_tokens, name) (2 tests)
- Deterministic ordering verification (1 test)

All tests use real JSON fixtures and temp directories per the
no-mock policy. Acceptance criteria met: 15+ tests covering
load, filter, scope, and error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
